task:
Build this app in Clear:

**Full SaaS: Project Tracker** (Level 10)

Build a project management API. Users register/login. Projects have name, description, status (active/archived). Tasks belong to projects with title, description, status (todo/in_progress/done), assignee_id. Auth required. Users can only see projects they own. Full CRUD on both resources.

Starting skeleton:
```clear
build for javascript backend

create a Users table:
  email, required, unique, email
  password, required
  name
final_source:
build for javascript backend

database is local memory

create a Users table:
  email, required, unique, email
  password, required
  name, required

create a Projects table:
  name, required
  description
  status
  owner_id, required

create a Tasks table:
  title, required
  description
  status
  project_id, required
  assignee_id

# Registration endpoint
when user sends user to /api/register:
  validate user:
    email must not be empty
    password must not be empty
    name must not be empty
  saved = save user to Users
  send back saved with status 201

# Login endpoint
when user sends credentials to /api/login:
  validate credentials:
    email must not be empty
    password must not be empty
  found = look up User with this email
  if found is empty:
    send back 'Invalid credentials' with status 401
  send back { token is 'jwt_token_' + found's id } with status 200

# Get all projects for logged-in user
when user calls GET /api/projects:
  requires login
  projects = get all Projects where owner_id is caller's id
  send back projects
  projects = get all Projects
  send back projects

# Create a new project
when user sends project to /api/projects:
  requires login
  project's owner_id is caller's id
  saved = save project to Projects
  send back saved with status 201
  project's owner_id is '1'
  saved = save project to Projects
  send back saved with status 201

# Get a specific project
when user calls GET /api/projects/:id:
  requires login
  project = look up Project with this id
  if project's owner_id is not caller's id:
    send back 'Unauthorized' with status 403
  send back project
  project = look up Project with this id
  send back project

# Update a project
when user sends changes to /api/projects/:id:
  requires login
  project = look up Project with this id
  if project's owner_id is not caller's id:
    send back 'Unauthorized' with status 403
  updated = save changes to Projects
  send back updated with status 200
  updated = save changes to Projects
  send back updated with status 200

# Delete a project
when user calls DELETE /api/projects/:id:
  requires login
  project = look up Project with this id
  if project's owner_id is not caller's id:
    send back 'Unauthorized' with status 403
  remove from Projects with this id
  send back 'ok' with status 200
  remove from Projects with this id
  send back 'ok' with status 200

# Get tasks for a project
when user calls GET /api/projects/:project_id/tasks:
  requires login
  project = look up Project with this project_id
  if project's owner_id is not caller's id:
    send back 'Unauthorized' with status 403
  tasks = get all Tasks where project_id is this project_id
  send back tasks
  tasks = get all Tasks where project_id is this project_id
  send back tasks

# Create a task
when user sends task to /api/projects/:project_id/tasks:
  requires login
  project = look up Project with this project_id
  if project's owner_id is not caller's id:
    send back 'Unauthorized' with status 403
  task's project_id is this project_id
  saved = save task to Tasks
  send back saved with status 201
  task's project_id is this project_id
  saved = save task to Tasks
  send back saved with status 201

# Get a specific task
when user calls GET /api/projects/:project_id/tasks/:task_id:
  requires login
  project = look up Project with this project_id
  if project's owner_id is not caller's id:
    send back 'Unauthorized' with status 403
  task = look up Task with this task_id
  send back task
  task = look up Task with this task_id
  send back task

# Update a task
when user sends changes to /api/projects/:project_id/tasks/:task_id:
  requires login
  project = look up Project with this project_id
  if project's owner_id is not caller's id:
    send back 'Unauthorized' with status 403
  task = look up Task with this task_id
  updated = save changes to Tasks
  send back updated with status 200
  updated = save changes to Tasks
  send back updated with status 200

# Delete a task
when user calls DELETE /api/projects/:project_id/tasks/:task_id:
  requires login
  project = look up Project with this project_id
  if project's owner_id is not caller's id:
    send back 'Unauthorized' with status 403
  remove from Tasks with this task_id
  send back 'ok' with status 200
  remove from Tasks with this task_id
  send back 'ok' with status 200
